question: What is the feature type name of feature AirCon?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.feature_type_name FROM Other_Available_Features AS T1 JOIN Ref_Feature_Types AS T2 ON T1.feature_type_code  =  T2.feature_type_code WHERE T1.feature_name  =  "AirCon"
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.feat_type_nm FROM ref_feature_types AS T2 JOIN other_available_features AS T1 ON T2.feat_type_code = T1.feat_type_code WHERE T1.feat_nm = 'AirCon'
raw_response: SELECT T2.feat_type_nm FROM ref_feature_types AS T2 JOIN other_available_features AS T1 ON T2.feat_type_code = T1.feat_type_code WHERE T1.feat_nm = 'AirCon'
